x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Holder
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity whose positions (e.g., balances, holdings, or exposures) are being tracked.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that maintains accounts or portfolios and is responsible for tracking and reporting positions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Custodian
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank or financial institution that holds and safeguards the assets and provides position information.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Manager
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or organization responsible for managing investments and monitoring positions to make decisions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that require and oversee accurate position tracking and reporting.
